name: soma
description:
A LinkML data model for representing biological assays, measurements, and experimental protocols in the context of outcomes research. The schema is centered around ASSAYS that inform on Key Events in Adverse Outcome Pathways (AOPs), with named slots for specific measurements.
This is the main entry point that imports the AOP framework, assay base schema, and domain-specific assay microschemas.
title: SOMA Schema

string.name: string
notes: In RDF serializations, a slot with range of string is treated as a literal or type xsd:string.   If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "string".

integer.name: integer
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "integer".

boolean.name: boolean
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "boolean".

float.name: float
float.description: A real number that conforms to the xsd:float specification
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "float".

double.name: double
double.description: A real number that conforms to the xsd:double specification
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "double".

decimal.name: decimal
decimal.description: A real number with arbitrary precision that conforms to the xsd:decimal specification
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "decimal".

time.name: time
time.description: A time object represents a (local) time of day, independent of any particular day
notes: URI is dateTime because OWL reasoners do not work with straight date or time
If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "time".

date.name: date
date.description: a date (year, month and day) in an idealized calendar
notes: URI is dateTime because OWL reasoners don't work with straight date or time
If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "date".

datetime.name: datetime
datetime.description: The combination of a date and time
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "datetime".

date_or_datetime.name: date_or_datetime
date_or_datetime.description: Either a date or a datetime
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "date_or_datetime".

uriorcurie.name: uriorcurie
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "uriorcurie".

curie.name: curie
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "curie".
comments: in RDF serializations this MUST be expanded to a URI
in non-RDF serializations MAY be serialized as the compact representation

uri.name: uri
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "uri".
comments: in RDF serializations a slot with range of uri is treated as a literal or type xsd:anyURI unless it is an identifier or a reference to an identifier, in which case it is translated directly to a node

ncname.name: ncname
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "ncname".

objectidentifier.name: objectidentifier
objectidentifier.description: A URI or CURIE that represents an object in the model.
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "objectidentifier".
comments: Used for inheritance and type checking

nodeidentifier.name: nodeidentifier
nodeidentifier.description: A URI, CURIE or BNODE that represents a node in a model.
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "nodeidentifier".

jsonpointer.name: jsonpointer
jsonpointer.description: A string encoding a JSON Pointer. The value of the string MUST conform to JSON Point syntax and SHOULD dereference to a valid object within the current instance document when encoded in tree form.
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "jsonpointer".

jsonpath.name: jsonpath
jsonpath.description: A string encoding a JSON Path. The value of the string MUST conform to JSON Point syntax and SHOULD dereference to zero or more valid objects within the current instance document when encoded in tree form.
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "jsonpath".

sparqlpath.name: sparqlpath
sparqlpath.description: A string encoding a SPARQL Property Path. The value of the string MUST conform to SPARQL syntax and SHOULD dereference to zero or more valid objects within the current instance document when encoded as RDF.
notes: If you are authoring schemas in LinkML YAML, the type is referenced with the lower case "sparqlpath".

BiologicalActionEnum.name: BiologicalActionEnum
BiologicalActionEnum.description: Types of biological changes or actions in key events.

BiologicalOrganizationLevelEnum.name: BiologicalOrganizationLevelEnum
BiologicalOrganizationLevelEnum.description: Levels of biological organization for key events.

EvidenceSupportEnum.name: EvidenceSupportEnum
EvidenceSupportEnum.description: Levels of evidence support for key event relationships.

strong.description: Strong empirical support with mechanistic understanding

moderate.description: Moderate support with some mechanistic evidence

QuantitativeUnderstandingEnum.name: QuantitativeUnderstandingEnum
QuantitativeUnderstandingEnum.description: Levels of quantitative understanding for key event relationships.

OutcomeLevelEnum.name: OutcomeLevelEnum
OutcomeLevelEnum.description: Levels at which adverse outcomes manifest.

individual.description: Adverse outcome in an individual organism

population.description: Adverse outcome at the population level

SampleTypeEnum.name: SampleTypeEnum
SampleTypeEnum.description: Types of biological samples for in vivo assays.

adherent.description: Cells grow attached to a surface

suspension.description: Cells grow suspended in culture medium

three_dimensional.description: Cells grown in 3D matrix or scaffold

SupplementTypeEnum.name: SupplementTypeEnum
SupplementTypeEnum.description: Categories of cell culture medium supplements.

AssayContextCapabilityEnum.name: AssayContextCapabilityEnum
AssayContextCapabilityEnum.description: Indicates what experimental contexts an assay class supports. Used to constrain valid study_subject types and enable context-appropriate slots.

in_vitro_only.description: Assay can only be performed in vitro (cell cultures, tissue slices, organoids, etc.)

in_vivo_only.description: Assay can only be performed in vivo (requires samples from or measurements on living human or animal subjects)

in_vitro_or_in_vivo.description: Assay can be performed in either in vitro or in vivo contexts depending on the experimental design

adverse_outcome_pathways.name: adverse_outcome_pathways
adverse_outcome_pathways.description: Collection of Adverse Outcome Pathways. AOPs describe sequences of causally linked events from molecular initiating events to adverse outcomes.

ciliary_function_assays.name: ciliary_function_assays
ciliary_function_assays.description: Collection of ciliary function assays. Informs on Key Event: "Decreased ciliary function". Contains named slots for beat frequency, active area, cilia length, etc.

asl_assays.name: asl_assays
asl_assays.description: Collection of airway surface liquid assays. Informs on Key Event: "Decreased ASL height" or "Altered airway hydration".

mcc_assays.name: mcc_assays
mcc_assays.description: Collection of mucociliary clearance assays. Informs on Key Event: "Impaired mucociliary clearance".

oxidative_stress_assays.name: oxidative_stress_assays
oxidative_stress_assays.description: Collection of oxidative stress assays. Informs on Key Event: "Increased oxidative stress" - often a Molecular Initiating Event.

cftr_assays.name: cftr_assays
cftr_assays.description: Collection of CFTR function assays. Informs on Key Event: "Decreased CFTR function".

egfr_signaling_assays.name: egfr_signaling_assays
egfr_signaling_assays.description: Collection of EGFR signaling assays. Informs on Key Event: "EGFR activation". Note: EGFR phosphorylation is the most specific evidence for activation.

goblet_cell_assays.name: goblet_cell_assays
goblet_cell_assays.description: Collection of goblet cell and mucin assays. Informs on Key Event: "Goblet cell hyperplasia" or "Mucin hypersecretion". Combined from previous GobletCellMeasurement and MucinProductionMeasurement.

balf_sputum_assays.name: balf_sputum_assays
balf_sputum_assays.description: Collection of BALF and sputum assays. In vivo only. Informs on Key Event: "Airway inflammation".

lung_function_assays.name: lung_function_assays
lung_function_assays.description: Collection of lung function assays. In vivo only. Informs on Adverse Outcome: "Decreased lung function" - the composite clinical outcome.

foxj_assays.name: foxj_assays
foxj_assays.description: Collection of FoxJ1/ciliogenesis assays. Informs on Key Event: "Altered ciliogenesis".

gene_expression_assays.name: gene_expression_assays
gene_expression_assays.description: Collection of gene expression assays. Generic assay for gene/protein expression measurements.

protocols.name: protocols
protocols.description: Collection of protocols. Contains Tier 2/3 procedural details important for reproducibility.

id.name: id
id.description: A unique identifier for the entity.

name.name: name
name.description: A human-readable name for the entity.

description.name: description
description.description: A detailed description of the entity.

biological_process.name: biological_process
biological_process.description: The biological process affected by this key event. Should reference a GO biological process term.

biological_object.name: biological_object
biological_object.description: The biological entity affected (protein, cell, tissue, organ).

biological_action.name: biological_action
biological_action.description: The type of change (increased, decreased, altered, impaired).

level_of_biological_organization.name: level_of_biological_organization
level_of_biological_organization.description: The level of biological organization at which this key event occurs.

occurs_in_cell_type.name: occurs_in_cell_type
occurs_in_cell_type.description: The cell type in which this key event occurs. Should reference a Cell Ontology (CL) term.

occurs_in_anatomy.name: occurs_in_anatomy
occurs_in_anatomy.description: The anatomical location where this key event occurs. Should reference a UBERON anatomy term.

aopwiki_id.name: aopwiki_id
aopwiki_id.description: The AOP-Wiki identifier for this entity (e.g., "AOP:411" for an AOP, "KE:1234" for a key event).

upstream_key_events.name: upstream_key_events
upstream_key_events.description: Key events that lead to this key event (upstream in the pathway).

downstream_key_events.name: downstream_key_events
downstream_key_events.description: Key events that follow this key event (downstream in the pathway).

upstream_event.name: upstream_event
upstream_event.description: The upstream key event in this relationship (cause).

downstream_event.name: downstream_event
downstream_event.description: The downstream key event in this relationship (effect).

relationship_type.name: relationship_type
relationship_type.description: The type of causal relationship (directly leads to, indirectly leads to).

evidence_support.name: evidence_support
evidence_support.description: Level of evidence supporting this key event relationship.

quantitative_understanding.name: quantitative_understanding
quantitative_understanding.description: Level of quantitative understanding of the relationship.

outcome_level.name: outcome_level
outcome_level.description: The level at which the adverse outcome manifests (individual, population).

molecular_initiating_event.name: molecular_initiating_event
molecular_initiating_event.description: The molecular initiating event that starts this AOP.

key_events.name: key_events
key_events.description: The key events in this AOP (intermediate events between MIE and AO).

key_event_relationships.name: key_event_relationships
key_event_relationships.description: The key event relationships connecting events in this AOP.

adverse_outcome.name: adverse_outcome
adverse_outcome.description: The adverse outcome that is the apical endpoint of this AOP.

stressors.name: stressors
stressors.description: Chemical or physical stressors that can trigger this AOP.

target_molecule.name: target_molecule
target_molecule.description: The molecular target of the stressor in the MIE (e.g., receptor, enzyme).

informs_on_key_event.name: informs_on_key_event
informs_on_key_event.description: The Key Event that this assay provides evidence for. This establishes the mechanistic connection between the assay measurements and the Adverse Outcome Pathway framework. Multiple assays can inform on the same key event, providing converging evidence.

has_specified_output.name: has_specified_output
has_specified_output.description: The measurement results produced by this assay — the specified output of a planned process (OBI). Contains the domain-specific measurement values (e.g., beat frequency, cilia length for CiliaryFunctionAssay).

cell_type.name: cell_type
cell_type.description: The cell type being studied. Reference to a Cell Ontology (CL) term. Used on CellularSystem and CellLine to describe the cell identity.

target_cell_type.name: target_cell_type
target_cell_type.description: The specific cell type that is the primary focus of this assay's analysis, when the assay examines multiple cell populations in a sample (e.g., neutrophils in a BALF differential).

model_species.name: model_species
model_species.description: The species of origin for the cells or organism being studied. Reference to NCBITaxon term.

subject_type.name: subject_type
subject_type.description: The specific type of study subject. Used to designate which concrete class (e.g., CellularSystem, InVivoSubject) is instantiated for polymorphic study_subject slots.

study_subject.name: study_subject
study_subject.description: The subject of the study — what the assay is performed on. Can be a ModelSystem (e.g., CellularSystem), an InVivoSubject, or a PopulationSubject. The type of subject determines which context slots are available.

sample_collection_method.name: sample_collection_method
sample_collection_method.description: Method used for sample collection in vivo (e.g., bronchoscopy, induced sputum, spirometry).

clinical_context.name: clinical_context
clinical_context.description: Clinical context for in vivo measurements (e.g., routine screening, post-exposure assessment, disease monitoring, baseline spirometry).

has_exposure_condition.name: has_exposure_condition
has_exposure_condition.description: The exposure condition(s) applied to the study subject. Captures the agent, concentration, duration, and timing of exposure/treatment. Multivalued to support co-exposures or dose-response series.

protocol_type.name: protocol_type
protocol_type.description: The specific type of protocol. Used to designate which concrete class (e.g., ImagingProtocol, StainingProtocol, SpirometryProtocol, MolecularAssayProtocol) is instantiated for polymorphic protocol slots.

follows_protocols.name: follows_protocols
follows_protocols.description: The Protocol(s) that this assay follows. Any Protocol or Protocol subclass (ImagingProtocol, StainingProtocol, SpirometryProtocol, MolecularAssayProtocol) is valid. Use this for general protocol references; assay subclasses also have typed protocol slots for domain-specific protocols.

sub_protocols.name: sub_protocols
sub_protocols.description: Other protocols that are part of this protocol's workflow. Use this to compose protocols from reusable steps (e.g., sample preparation, wash steps, fixation, post-processing). Any Protocol or Protocol subclass is valid.

days_at_differentiation.name: days_at_differentiation
days_at_differentiation.description: Days at air-liquid interface or differentiation stage.

donor_info.name: donor_info
donor_info.description: Information about cell donor (e.g., healthy non-smoker, CF patient, age, anatomical region).

replicates_per_donor.name: replicates_per_donor
replicates_per_donor.description: Number of biological replicates per donor.

assay_date.name: assay_date
assay_date.description: Date when the assay was performed.

subject_characteristics.name: subject_characteristics
subject_characteristics.description: Relevant subject characteristics (disease state, medications, etc.). TIER 1 for LungFunctionAssay per user feedback.

sample_type.name: sample_type
sample_type.description: Type of biological sample (e.g., sputum, BALF, blood).

collection_date.name: collection_date
collection_date.description: Date when the sample was collected.

cohort_size.name: cohort_size
cohort_size.description: Number of subjects in the cohort or population.

inclusion_criteria.name: inclusion_criteria
inclusion_criteria.description: Criteria for inclusion in the study population.

age_range.name: age_range
age_range.description: Age range of the study population.

subjects.name: subjects
subjects.description: Individual subjects in the population or cohort. Optional — use when individual-level data is available alongside aggregate cohort metadata.

sop_reference.name: sop_reference
sop_reference.description: Reference to standard operating procedure document.

imaging_frame_rate.name: imaging_frame_rate
imaging_frame_rate.description: Frame rate for video/imaging acquisition (e.g., 200 fps).

spatial_resolution.name: spatial_resolution
spatial_resolution.description: Spatial resolution of imaging (e.g., 1-2 um axial resolution).

evaporation_prevention.name: evaporation_prevention
evaporation_prevention.description: Method used to prevent evaporation (e.g., perfluorocarbon overlay).

fluorescent_tracer.name: fluorescent_tracer
fluorescent_tracer.description: Fluorescent tracer used for tracking (MCC assays).

particle_tracking_method.name: particle_tracking_method
particle_tracking_method.description: Method used for tracking particles or mucus.

detection_method.name: detection_method
detection_method.description: Detection method used (e.g., flow cytometry, plate reader).

staining_type.name: staining_type
staining_type.description: Type of staining used (e.g., immunofluorescence, AB-PAS).

antibodies_used.name: antibodies_used
antibodies_used.description: Antibodies used in staining or detection.

fixation_method.name: fixation_method
fixation_method.description: Fixation method used for tissue/cell preparation.

primer_sequences.name: primer_sequences
primer_sequences.description: Primer sequences used for PCR-based methods.

lysis_buffer.name: lysis_buffer
lysis_buffer.description: Lysis buffer used for sample preparation.

platform.name: platform
platform.description: Assay platform or instrument used (e.g., QuantStudio, Illumina).

key_reagents.name: key_reagents
key_reagents.description: Key reagents needed for this protocol.

obi_mapping.name: obi_mapping
obi_mapping.description: OBI ontology term for this method.

exposure_agent.name: exposure_agent
exposure_agent.description: The chemical, biological, or environmental agent used for exposure or treatment. Reference to a CHEBI or ECTO ontology term.

exposure_concentration.name: exposure_concentration
exposure_concentration.description: Concentration of the exposure agent applied.

timing_post_exposure.name: timing_post_exposure
timing_post_exposure.description: Time after exposure when the measurement was taken. Used to capture the temporal relationship between exposure and assay readout.

value.name: value
value.description: The numeric value of the quantity.

beat_frequency_hz.name: beat_frequency_hz
beat_frequency_hz.description: Ciliary beat frequency measured in Hz. TIER 1 - critical for assessing ciliary function.

active_area_percentage.name: active_area_percentage
active_area_percentage.description: Percentage of epithelial surface with actively beating cilia. TIER 1 - critical for assessing ciliary coverage.

cilia_length.name: cilia_length
cilia_length.description: Length of cilia measured in micrometers. TIER 1 - morphological assessment of cilia.

cilia_per_cell.name: cilia_per_cell
cilia_per_cell.description: Number of cilia per ciliated cell. TIER 1.

percentage_ciliated_cells.name: percentage_ciliated_cells
percentage_ciliated_cells.description: Percentage of cells that are ciliated. TIER 1 - critical for understanding ciliated cell populations.

ciliary_motion_patterns.name: ciliary_motion_patterns
ciliary_motion_patterns.description: Patterns of ciliary motion (coordinated, dyskinetic, immotile). TIER 2 - supporting information.

analysis_software.name: analysis_software
analysis_software.description: Software used for analysis (e.g., SAVA, Cilia FA).

airway_region.name: airway_region
airway_region.description: Region of airway from which cells originated.

asl_height_um.name: asl_height_um
asl_height_um.description: Airway surface liquid height in micrometers. TIER 1 - primary measurement for ASL assays.

periciliary_layer_depth.name: periciliary_layer_depth
periciliary_layer_depth.description: Depth of the periciliary layer in micrometers. TIER 1 - helps give confidence to the outcome.

mucus_layer_thickness.name: mucus_layer_thickness
mucus_layer_thickness.description: Thickness of the mucus gel layer in micrometers. TIER 2.

ion_composition.name: ion_composition
ion_composition.description: Ionic composition (Cl-, Na+, K+). TIER 3 - not critical for comparison but relevant for mechanism.

asl_ph.name: asl_ph
asl_ph.description: pH of airway surface liquid. TIER 3.

transport_rate.name: transport_rate
transport_rate.description: Mucociliary transport rate. TIER 1 - primary outcome measure for MCC assays.

percentage_active_transport.name: percentage_active_transport
percentage_active_transport.description: Percentage of area showing active transport. TIER 2.

mucus_composition.name: mucus_composition
mucus_composition.description: Composition of mucus. TIER 2 per feedback.

reactive_oxygen_species.name: reactive_oxygen_species
reactive_oxygen_species.description: ROS level as fold change or fluorescence intensity. TIER 1.

ros_probe_type.name: ros_probe_type
ros_probe_type.description: Type of ROS probe used (DCFDA, DHE, MitoSOX, etc.). TIER 1 - varies by method.

lipid_peroxidation.name: lipid_peroxidation
lipid_peroxidation.description: Lipid peroxidation level. TIER 1 - surrogate marker for OS.

dna_damage_markers.name: dna_damage_markers
dna_damage_markers.description: DNA damage markers (8-OHdG). TIER 1 - surrogate for OS.

antioxidant_capacity.name: antioxidant_capacity
antioxidant_capacity.description: Total antioxidant capacity or GSH/GSSG ratio. TIER 1.

glutathione_ratio.name: glutathione_ratio
glutathione_ratio.description: GSH/GSSG ratio indicating antioxidant status. TIER 1.

antioxidant_enzyme_activities.name: antioxidant_enzyme_activities
antioxidant_enzyme_activities.description: Antioxidant enzyme activities (SOD, catalase, GPx). TIER 1.

detection_method_details.name: detection_method_details
detection_method_details.description: Detection method details. TIER 1 per feedback - expected to have multiple detection methods.

sweat_chloride_concentration.name: sweat_chloride_concentration
sweat_chloride_concentration.description: Sweat chloride concentration in mEq/L (CF diagnostic).

egfr_phosphorylation_y1068.name: egfr_phosphorylation_y1068
egfr_phosphorylation_y1068.description: EGFR phosphorylation at Y1068 residue (fold change). TIER 1 - MOST SPECIFIC evidence for EGFR activation.

egfr_phosphorylation_y1173.name: egfr_phosphorylation_y1173
egfr_phosphorylation_y1173.description: EGFR phosphorylation at Y1173 residue (fold change). TIER 1.

total_egfr_protein.name: total_egfr_protein
total_egfr_protein.description: Total EGFR protein level (loading control). TIER 1.

downstream_kinase_activation.name: downstream_kinase_activation
downstream_kinase_activation.description: Activation levels of downstream kinases. TIER 2 - not specific to EGFR alone without phosphorylation data.

pathway_biomarkers.name: pathway_biomarkers
pathway_biomarkers.description: Pathway-specific biomarker signatures. TIER 2 - relationship to outcome needs further investigation.

egfr_ligand_expression.name: egfr_ligand_expression
egfr_ligand_expression.description: Expression of EGFR ligands (EGF, TGF-alpha, amphiregulin).

goblet_cell_count.name: goblet_cell_count
goblet_cell_count.description: Number of goblet cells (raw count). TIER 1 - want both raw and relative information.

muc5ac_mrna_expression.name: muc5ac_mrna_expression
muc5ac_mrna_expression.description: MUC5AC mRNA expression level (fold change). TIER 1.

muc5b_mrna_expression.name: muc5b_mrna_expression
muc5b_mrna_expression.description: MUC5B mRNA expression level (fold change). TIER 1.

muc5ac_muc5b_ratio.name: muc5ac_muc5b_ratio
muc5ac_muc5b_ratio.description: MUC5AC to MUC5B ratio. TIER 1 - important for disease state.

mucin_protein_concentration.name: mucin_protein_concentration
mucin_protein_concentration.description: Total mucin protein concentration. TIER 1 - want both direct and comparative measures.

percent_solids.name: percent_solids
percent_solids.description: Percent solids in apical secretion (overall secretion). TIER 1.

goblet_to_ciliated_ratio.name: goblet_to_ciliated_ratio
goblet_to_ciliated_ratio.description: Ratio of goblet cells to ciliated cells. TIER 2 - related to transdifferentiation but not critical for outcome.

imaging_protocol.name: imaging_protocol
imaging_protocol.description: Reference to the imaging protocol used. TIER 1 for CBF, ASL assays.

staining_protocol.name: staining_protocol
staining_protocol.description: Reference to staining protocol (AB-PAS, immunochem). TIER 1.

molecular_protocol.name: molecular_protocol
molecular_protocol.description: Reference to the molecular assay protocol used.

spirometry_protocol.name: spirometry_protocol
spirometry_protocol.description: Reference to the spirometry protocol used.

fev1.name: fev1
fev1.description: Forced expiratory volume in 1 second. TIER 1 - primary spirometry measurement.

fvc.name: fvc
fvc.description: Forced vital capacity. TIER 1 - primary spirometry measurement.

reference_dataset.name: reference_dataset
reference_dataset.description: Reference dataset for interpretation (GLI-2012 for humans). TIER 1 - essential for interpretation.

fev1_fvc_ratio.name: fev1_fvc_ratio
fev1_fvc_ratio.description: Ratio of FEV1 to FVC (Tiffeneau-Pinelli index). TIER 2 - can be calculated from FEV1 and FVC.

feno.name: feno
feno.description: Fractional exhaled nitric oxide in ppb. TIER 2 - marker for airway inflammation.

decline_rate.name: decline_rate
decline_rate.description: Longitudinal decline rate in mL/year. TIER 2 - useful for pre/post comparisons.

bronchodilator_response.name: bronchodilator_response
bronchodilator_response.description: Response to bronchodilator (% change in FEV1). TIER 2 - informs reversibility.

dlco.name: dlco
dlco.description: Diffusing capacity for carbon monoxide. TIER 2 - measure of fibrosis, needs hemoglobin level.

hemoglobin_level.name: hemoglobin_level
hemoglobin_level.description: Hemoglobin level. TIER 2 - pairs with DLCO.

fef25_75.name: fef25_75
fef25_75.description: Forced expiratory flow 25-75%. TIER 3 - more variable than FEV1, FVC.

total_lung_capacity.name: total_lung_capacity
total_lung_capacity.description: Total lung capacity. TIER 3 - requires more equipment.

functional_residual_capacity.name: functional_residual_capacity
functional_residual_capacity.description: Functional residual capacity. TIER 3 - requires more equipment.

residual_volume.name: residual_volume
residual_volume.description: Residual volume. TIER 3 - requires more equipment.

lung_compliance.name: lung_compliance
lung_compliance.description: Lung compliance. TIER 3 - most often reported for animals, difficult to relate to human exposure.

lung_elastance.name: lung_elastance
lung_elastance.description: Lung elastance. TIER 3 - most often reported for animals.

lung_resistance.name: lung_resistance
lung_resistance.description: Lung resistance. TIER 3 - most often reported for animals.

percentage_positive_cells.name: percentage_positive_cells
percentage_positive_cells.description: Percentage of positive cells (IHC, flow cytometry).

gene_expression_method.name: gene_expression_method
gene_expression_method.description: Method used for gene expression (qRT-PCR, RNA-seq, etc.).

Container.name: Container
Container.description:
Root container for outcomes research data. Organized around ASSAYS that inform on Key Events in Adverse Outcome Pathways (AOPs).
The schema is assay-centric: each assay class contains named slots for its specific measurements, with an explicit connection to the Key Event it informs via the informs_on_key_event slot.

key_events.name: key_events
key_events.description: The key events in this AOP (intermediate events between MIE and AO).

adverse_outcome_pathways.name: adverse_outcome_pathways
adverse_outcome_pathways.description: Collection of Adverse Outcome Pathways. AOPs describe sequences of causally linked events from molecular initiating events to adverse outcomes.

ciliary_function_assays.name: ciliary_function_assays
ciliary_function_assays.description: Collection of ciliary function assays. Informs on Key Event: "Decreased ciliary function". Contains named slots for beat frequency, active area, cilia length, etc.

asl_assays.name: asl_assays
asl_assays.description: Collection of airway surface liquid assays. Informs on Key Event: "Decreased ASL height" or "Altered airway hydration".

mcc_assays.name: mcc_assays
mcc_assays.description: Collection of mucociliary clearance assays. Informs on Key Event: "Impaired mucociliary clearance".

oxidative_stress_assays.name: oxidative_stress_assays
oxidative_stress_assays.description: Collection of oxidative stress assays. Informs on Key Event: "Increased oxidative stress" - often a Molecular Initiating Event.

cftr_assays.name: cftr_assays
cftr_assays.description: Collection of CFTR function assays. Informs on Key Event: "Decreased CFTR function".

lung_function_assays.name: lung_function_assays
lung_function_assays.description: Collection of lung function assays. In vivo only. Informs on Adverse Outcome: "Decreased lung function" - the composite clinical outcome.

foxj_assays.name: foxj_assays
foxj_assays.description: Collection of FoxJ1/ciliogenesis assays. Informs on Key Event: "Altered ciliogenesis".

gene_expression_assays.name: gene_expression_assays
gene_expression_assays.description: Collection of gene expression assays. Generic assay for gene/protein expression measurements.

protocols.name: protocols
protocols.description: Collection of protocols. Contains Tier 2/3 procedural details important for reproducibility.

KeyEvent.name: KeyEvent
KeyEvent.description: A measurable change in biological state that is a step in an Adverse Outcome Pathway. Key Events represent the biological perturbations that assays measure to provide evidence for AOP-based mechanistic understanding. Key events can be Molecular Initiating Events (MIEs), intermediate Key Events, or Adverse Outcomes at the organism/population level.

Assay.name: Assay
Assay.description: A planned process with the objective to produce information about biological state relevant to a Key Event in an Adverse Outcome Pathway. Assays are organized by the functional domain they assess (e.g., ciliary function, oxidative stress), and each domain-specific assay class contains named slots for the specific measurements it can produce. Assays inform on key events and contain the measurement data as named slots.

informs_on_key_event.name: informs_on_key_event
informs_on_key_event.description: The Key Event that this assay provides evidence for. This establishes the mechanistic connection between the assay measurements and the Adverse Outcome Pathway framework. Multiple assays can inform on the same key event, providing converging evidence.

study_subject.name: study_subject
study_subject.description: The subject of the study — what the assay is performed on. Can be a ModelSystem (e.g., CellularSystem), an InVivoSubject, or a PopulationSubject. The type of subject determines which context slots are available.

has_exposure_condition.name: has_exposure_condition
has_exposure_condition.description: The exposure condition(s) applied to the study subject. Captures the agent, concentration, duration, and timing of exposure/treatment. Multivalued to support co-exposures or dose-response series.

follows_protocols.name: follows_protocols
follows_protocols.description: The Protocol(s) that this assay follows. Any Protocol or Protocol subclass (ImagingProtocol, StainingProtocol, SpirometryProtocol, MolecularAssayProtocol) is valid. Use this for general protocol references; assay subclasses also have typed protocol slots for domain-specific protocols.

has_specified_output.name: has_specified_output
has_specified_output.description: The measurement results produced by this assay — the specified output of a planned process (OBI). Contains the domain-specific measurement values (e.g., beat frequency, cilia length for CiliaryFunctionAssay).

assay_date.name: assay_date
assay_date.description: Date when the assay was performed.

This class represents the "output" in the Input/Process/Output model: what was measured and what values were obtained.

FoxJExpressionAssay.description:
Assay for measuring FoxJ1 expression related to ciliogenesis. Informs on Key Event: "Altered ciliogenesis" in respiratory AOPs. FoxJ1 is a master transcription factor for motile cilia.
This assay is primarily IN VITRO focused.

informs_on_key_event.name: informs_on_key_event
informs_on_key_event.description: The Key Event that this assay provides evidence for. This establishes the mechanistic connection between the assay measurements and the Adverse Outcome Pathway framework. Multiple assays can inform on the same key event, providing converging evidence.

study_subject.name: study_subject
study_subject.description: The subject of the study — what the assay is performed on. Can be a ModelSystem (e.g., CellularSystem), an InVivoSubject, or a PopulationSubject. The type of subject determines which context slots are available.

has_exposure_condition.name: has_exposure_condition
has_exposure_condition.description: The exposure condition(s) applied to the study subject. Captures the agent, concentration, duration, and timing of exposure/treatment. Multivalued to support co-exposures or dose-response series.

follows_protocols.name: follows_protocols
follows_protocols.description: The Protocol(s) that this assay follows. Any Protocol or Protocol subclass (ImagingProtocol, StainingProtocol, SpirometryProtocol, MolecularAssayProtocol) is valid. Use this for general protocol references; assay subclasses also have typed protocol slots for domain-specific protocols.

has_specified_output.name: has_specified_output
has_specified_output.description: The measurement results produced by this assay — the specified output of a planned process (OBI). Contains the domain-specific measurement values (e.g., beat frequency, cilia length for CiliaryFunctionAssay).

assay_date.description: Date when the assay was performed.
